mapper.select: SELECT ga.id AS groupId, ga.goods_id AS goodsId, ga.type, ga.p_num AS pNum, ga.max_num AS maxNum, ga.start_time AS startTime, ga.end_time AS endTime, CAST(ga.price AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS groupPrice, c.price AS originPrice, c.title, c.cover FROM osh_group_activity ga LEFT JOIN osh_course c ON c.id = ga.goods_id AND c.delete_flag = 0 WHERE ga.end_time > NOW() AND ga.start_time <= NOW() ORDER BY CAST(ga.price AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ASC, ga.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
